statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1241 — D-FUMT₈|₄ ≅ Priest FDE 4-value (Belnap-Dunn 1977) — Axiom-Free
              Sub-Algebra Isomorphism in Lean 4

  Sibling to STEP 1218 (D-FUMT₈ ≇ Zaitsev EIGHT₄) and STEP 1219 v3b (D-FUMT₈
  ≇ Heald U8). Those were *non*-isomorphism results between distinct 8-value
  algebras. This file establishes the *positive* sub-algebra fact:

      D-FUMT₈ restricted to {TRUE, FALSE, BOTH, NEITHER}
        ≅
      Belnap-Dunn FOUR (Belnap 1977, Anderson-Belnap 1975)
        =
      Priest FDE 4-value (the 4-element fragment of Priest's catuṣkoṭi logic,
                          be
